conversation.speaker: Andrew Krepthy
conversation.text: Hey Smitha, how's the AI landscape looking this week?

conversation.text: Pretty exciting, Andrew! There are some breakthrough developments in multimodal models.

conversation.text: Excellent points. Thanks for the insights!
